description: Real-time fraud detection — Redpanda → RisingWave streaming pipeline. 7 fraud patterns, sub-300ms signal latency, 5-second refresh.

panels.description: Accounts with risk score > 0.8 right now
panels.title: Critical Accounts

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS val FROM mv_account_risk_score_realtime WHERE risk_tier = 'critical'

panels.description: Accounts with risk score > 0.5 right now
panels.title: High + Critical Accounts

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS val FROM mv_account_risk_score_realtime WHERE risk_tier IN ('high','critical')

panels.description: Investigation cases currently in HIGH or CRITICAL tier
panels.title: Open Fraud Cases

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS val FROM mv_open_fraud_cases

panels.description: Total transaction volume in the latest 1-min window
panels.title: Transactions / min

targets.rawSql: SELECT total_transactions AS val FROM mv_fraud_kpis_1min ORDER BY window_start DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Mean rule confidence across active alerts (0 – 100%)
panels.title: Avg Alert Confidence

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(avg_alert_confidence::NUMERIC * 100, 1) AS val FROM mv_fraud_kpis_1min ORDER BY window_start DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Count of fraud signal triggers per 1-minute window — stacked by pattern type
panels.title: Signal Events Over Time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  window_start AS "time",
  velocity_breaches    AS "Velocity",
  geo_anomalies        AS "Geo Impossible",
  brute_force_attempts AS "Brute Force",
  structuring_flags    AS "Structuring"
FROM mv_fraud_kpis_1min
WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start)
ORDER BY window_start ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', window_end) AS "time", COUNT(*) AS "CNP Spike"
FROM mv_cnp_spike
WHERE is_cnp_spike AND $__timeFilter(window_end)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', window_end) AS "time", COUNT(*) AS "Compound Fraud"
FROM mv_correlated_alert_burst
WHERE is_compound_fraud AND $__timeFilter(window_end)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC

panels.description: Count of active fraud signal hits across all patterns in their respective lookback windows
panels.title: Active Signals — Last Window

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_velocity_alerts
   WHERE is_velocity_breach AND window_end >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes')    AS "Velocity",
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_geo_impossible_trips
   WHERE is_impossible AND txn2_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes')         AS "Geo Impossible",
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_device_anomalies
   WHERE combined_risk_flag AND occurred_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes')  AS "Device Anomaly",
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_cnp_spike
   WHERE is_cnp_spike AND window_end >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes')          AS "CNP Spike",
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_login_failure_storm
   WHERE is_brute_force AND window_end >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes')        AS "Brute Force",
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_structuring_detection
   WHERE is_structuring_pattern AND window_end >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 minutes') AS "Structuring",
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_correlated_alert_burst
   WHERE is_compound_fraud AND window_end >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes')     AS "Compound Fraud"

panels.description: Total vs high-risk MCC transaction volume per 1-minute window
panels.title: Transaction Throughput

targets.rawSql:
SELECT window_start AS "time",
       total_transactions AS "Total",
       flagged_transactions AS "High-Risk MCC"
FROM mv_fraud_kpis_1min
WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start)
ORDER BY window_start ASC

panels.description: Percentage of transactions hitting high-risk MCCs — threshold lines at 5% and 10%
panels.title: Fraud Rate % Over Time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT window_start AS "time", fraud_rate_pct AS "Fraud Rate %"
FROM mv_fraud_kpis_1min
WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start)
ORDER BY window_start ASC

panels.description: Distribution of all accounts active in the last 60 minutes by risk tier
panels.title: Account Risk Tier

targets.rawSql:
SELECT risk_tier AS "Tier", COUNT(*) AS "Accounts"
FROM mv_account_risk_score_realtime
GROUP BY risk_tier
ORDER BY CASE risk_tier WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2
         WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

panels.description: Transaction volume and high-risk MCC flags by payment channel — last 1 hour
panels.title: Channel Risk Breakdown

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  channel AS "Channel",
  SUM(txn_count)     AS "Total",
  SUM(flagged_count) AS "High-Risk MCC"
FROM mv_channel_risk_breakdown
WHERE window_start >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
GROUP BY channel
ORDER BY "Total" DESC

panels.description: Top merchants by high-risk MCC exposure in the last hour
panels.title: Merchant Fraud Exposure

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  LEFT(merchant_name, 22)                        AS "Merchant",
  merchant_category_code                         AS "MCC",
  SUM(total_txns)                                AS "Txns",
  SUM(flagged_txns)                              AS "Flagged",
  ROUND(AVG(fraud_exposure_pct)::NUMERIC, 1)     AS "Exposure %"
FROM mv_merchant_fraud_exposure
WHERE window_start >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
GROUP BY merchant_name, merchant_category_code
HAVING SUM(flagged_txns) > 0
ORDER BY "Exposure %" DESC
LIMIT 8

panels.description: All accounts currently in HIGH or CRITICAL risk tier, sorted by risk score
panels.title: Open Fraud Cases

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  LEFT(account_id, 8)  AS "Account",
  LEFT(customer_id, 8) AS "Customer",
  ROUND(risk_score::NUMERIC, 3) AS "Risk Score",
  risk_tier            AS "Tier",
  kyc_risk_tier        AS "KYC",
  recommended_action   AS "Action",
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(contributing_signals::TEXT,'{',''),'}',''),',',' · ') AS "Signals"
FROM mv_open_fraud_cases
ORDER BY risk_score DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.description: High and critical severity alerts from the last 30 minutes, newest first
panels.title: Recent Alerts

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  occurred_at                                    AS "Time",
  alert_type                                     AS "Alert Type",
  severity                                       AS "Severity",
  ROUND(confidence_score::NUMERIC, 2)            AS "Confidence",
  LEFT(customer_id, 8)                           AS "Customer",
  customer_kyc_tier                              AS "KYC Tier",
  rule_id                                        AS "Rule"
FROM mv_recent_high_alerts
ORDER BY occurred_at DESC
LIMIT 60

panels.description: Total transaction volume and high-risk MCC flag count per hour
panels.title: Hourly Fraud Trend — Last 24 Hours

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  hour_bucket AS "time",
  total_txns  AS "Total Transactions",
  fraud_flags AS "High-Risk MCC Flags",
  fraud_rate_pct AS "Rate %"
FROM mv_hourly_fraud_trend
WHERE $__timeFilter(hour_bucket)
ORDER BY hour_bucket ASC

panels.description: Accounts whose risk score has dropped below 0.3 — cases cleared from the queue
panels.title: Resolved Cases Today

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS val FROM mv_resolved_cases_today

title: Fraud Detection — Live Operations
